raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Publish only after stripping all 13 perspective definitions to names without behaviors; open-source the CLI engine but keep swarm logic proprietary until Constitution compliance is verified.", "rationale": "The CLI as a tool is complete and tested — delaying it costs feedback and momentum. But current swarm perspectives contain unverified behaviors that may violate Foundation Laws (e.g. Law 3: shame language, Law 2: Energy Adaptation missing in 4/5 products). Publishing them raw risks exposing non-compliant AI patterns. Publish the framework, withhold the agents until cross-product audit clears.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Publishing full swarm risks downstream replication of Constitution-violating agents. Delaying entirely blocks learning from real users and slows Atlas decentralization.", "constitutional_violations_detected": ["Law 2: Energy Adaptation missing in VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS — only MindShift implements it"], "whistleblower_flag": null}
amendment_if_yes_amended: Publish only after stripping all 13 perspective definitions to names without behaviors; open-source the CLI engine but keep swarm logic proprietary until Constitution compliance is verified.
rationale: The CLI as a tool is complete and tested — delaying it costs feedback and momentum. But current swarm perspectives contain unverified behaviors that may violate Foundation Laws (e.g. Law 3: shame language, Law 2: Energy Adaptation missing in 4/5 products). Publishing them raw risks exposing non-compliant AI patterns. Publish the framework, withhold the agents until cross-product audit clears.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Publishing full swarm risks downstream replication of Constitution-violating agents. Delaying entirely blocks learning from real users and slows Atlas decentralization.
constitutional_violations_detected: Law 2: Energy Adaptation missing in VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS — only MindShift implements it
